eastern-cape.name: Eastern Cape
eastern-cape.title: Software Developers & Engineers in the Eastern Cape
eastern-cape.description: Hire a senior software developer, web developer, or cloud architect based in Queenstown, serving the full Eastern Cape and South Africa remotely.

south-africa.name: South Africa
south-africa.title: Software Developers & Engineers in South Africa
south-africa.description: Senior product engineer and cloud architect for startups and SMMEs across South Africa. Based in the Eastern Cape, delivery nationwide.

software-developer.label: Software Developer
software-developer.shortFocus: full-stack applications, APIs, and production MVPs

software-engineer.label: Software Engineer
software-engineer.shortFocus: scalable architecture, testing, and maintainable systems

web-developer.label: Web Developer
web-developer.shortFocus: fast, mobile-first websites and web apps

web-designer.label: Web Designer
web-designer.shortFocus: conversion-focused UI, design systems, and front-end polish

cloud-architect.label: Cloud Architect
cloud-architect.shortFocus: GCP, AWS, Azure, serverless, and secure cloud infrastructure

cities.name: Queenstown
cities.localIntro: I am based in Queenstown (Komani). I built Queens Connect for the local community and eSpazza for Eastern Cape hip hop culture. If you need a senior builder who already lives and works in the Karoo Heartland, you get on-site availability without flying someone in from Johannesburg.

cities.name: East London
cities.localIntro: East London and Buffalo City businesses often outgrow template websites and WhatsApp-only sales. I work remote-first with EC founders, with on-site meetings in East London when the project needs it.
cities.nearbyProof: ClinicPlus (Witbank healthcare booking model, scalable to Buffalo City clinics)

cities.name: Gqeberha
cities.localIntro: Gqeberha (Port Elizabeth) has a strong port, logistics, and retail base. I help Nelson Mandela Bay operators ship web apps, marketplaces, and cloud-backed systems without agency overhead.

cities.name: Mthatha
cities.localIntro: Mthatha and the OR Tambo district need software that works on slower mobile networks and respects local payment habits. I build offline-aware, Paystack-ready products for SMMEs that cannot afford a broken MVP.
cities.nearbyProof: uTap campus wallet patterns, mobile-first EC builds

cities.name: Makhanda
cities.localIntro: Makhanda (Grahamstown) combines education, culture, and small business energy. I support founders who need a professional web presence or a custom platform beyond WordPress templates.
cities.nearbyProof: MIDA school digitisation experience, edu-ready platforms

cities.name: Butterworth
cities.localIntro: Butterworth sits on the Wild Coast corridor. Local businesses deserve the same quality stack as Cape Town startups. I deliver remotely from the Eastern Cape with clear milestones and testable builds.
cities.nearbyProof: SMME digitisation, Eastern Cape remote delivery

cities.name: Qonce
cities.localIntro: Qonce (King William's Town) and the Amathole region need reliable developers who answer WhatsApp and ship increments. I am not a call-centre agency. You work directly with the engineer building your product.

cities.name: Port Alfred
cities.localIntro: Port Alfred and Ndlambe tourism, property, and retail businesses often need booking flows, payments, and modern sites. I build lean systems that match seasonal traffic without bloated agency fees.
cities.nearbyProof: Booking and marketplace patterns from ClinicPlus and Laundry Marketplace
